title: Looking for Category Manager at FurnitureMart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at FurnitureMart
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FurnitureMart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
